emails.subject: Re: FW: Canadian Retail
emails.body: Re: FW: Canadian Retail Jim, I will be travelling tomorrow and will not be at the GC meeting. Please let me know how to best be brought up to date if there is a discussion at the GC meeting. To: Derrick Jr., James; Haedicke, Mark

emails.subject: RE: FW: Canadian Retail
emails.body: RE: FW: Canadian Retail Vicki, let's discusss this today; I will get Mark's thoughts tomorrow.

emails.subject: Re: FW: Canadian Retail
emails.body: Re: FW: Canadian Retail Has a decision been made about this matter? thanks, Vicki To: Derrick Jr., James; Haedicke, Mark

emails.body: RE: FW: Canadian Retail Mark was going to discuss the matter with Peter and then get with me. To m= y knowledge, no decision has yet been made. Jim
